[textmode.js](../../../index.md) / [Textmodifier](../../Textmodifier.md) / radians

# Method: radians()

```ts
radians(degrees): number;
```

Convert degrees to radians.

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| ------ | ------ | ------ |
| `degrees` | `number` | Angle in degrees. |

## Returns

`number`

Angle in radians.
